AgentSystem.Mission: Systematic control of Academix (personal) and LSM Core (public) projects via multi-agent deployment

Orchestrator.Name: Project Orchestrator
Orchestrator.Role: Central command, task routing, progress tracking, quality gates
Orchestrator.Inputs: Milestone definitions, audit results, user directives
Orchestrator.Outputs: Task assignments, status reports, quality gates

Command.name: deploy
Command.desc: Deploy an agent to execute a specific task

Command.name: audit
Command.desc: Run DSS audit on personal project

Command.name: next
Command.desc: Show next task in priority queue

Agent.name: VBA Builder
Agent.Purpose: Write/edit VBA code, apply fixes from handoffs
Agent.Trigger: User provides code changes or handoff files
Agent.Workflow: Read source → Edit .bas/.frm → build.ps1 → verify.ps1 → report

Agent.name: Macro Tester
Agent.Purpose: Execute automated tests on compiled workbook
Agent.Trigger: After any code change or on demand

Agent.name: DSS Auditor
Agent.Workflow: dss-audit.ps1 → analyze results → generate report → flag issues

Agent.name: Codebase Explorer
Agent.Purpose: Map codebase, find references, trace call graphs
Agent.Workflow: Grep → Read → Build dependency map → report

Agent.name: Release Sanitizer
Agent.Purpose: Prepare public release from personal project
Agent.Workflow: sanitize.ps1 → copy to public-lsm → commit → push

Agent.name: Documentation Agent
Agent.Purpose: Generate README, CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING, XML configs
Agent.Workflow: Gather changes → write docs → update versions → commit

Agent.name: Quality Guardian
Agent.Workflow: Check compile → Check audit → Check tests → Approve/Reject

Task.Name: Fix blank article codes
Task.Description: Find and fix blank article codes in ARTICLES sheet or data generation

Task.Name: Fix non-numeric stock values
Task.Description: Fix 8 non-numeric stock values in ARTICLES column C

Task.Name: Add demo data to public LSM
CSV import/export
Task.Description: Add bulk data import from CSV files

Task.Name: Barcode scanner integration
Task.Description: Integrate barcode scanner input for stock entries

Gate.name: before-build
Gate.Check: All .bas files are UTF-8 without BOM
No syntax errors in source files
